description:
GTC Allocation to GR10 Grantees 
This proposal looks to ratify the allocation of 20,000 GTC from the Community Treasury towards grant recipients in the Gitcoin builds GitcoinDAO category of Round 10. We ask that stewards execute this according to the Snapshot vote passed on July 25th, 2021. 

The full proposal can be found here:

https://snapshot.org/#/gitcoindao.eth/proposal/QmY7yvzid9KM8Jn5MrAXe853wRmk5tjNSzW2DR82q8Z5RJ

This is the first proposal of its kind, and helps us dogfood DAO tooling.

FDD Workstream Q4 2021 Budget 
On-chain ratification of the FDD workstream Q4 budget as voted here: https://snapshot.org/#/gitcoindao.eth/proposal/0x265fe70790524875caacb6675ef6d10b4d4ceac8b1c26df26ad1ba284eab70a1

PrimeDAO Mutual Grant Agreement 
This proposal looks to ratify the grant of 25,000 GTC to PrimeDAO for the previously agreed on partnership. 

The snapshot vote passed on Dec 13, 2021: https://snapshot.org/#/gitcoindao.eth/proposal/0x29eaaff1ca752785b508298b4aaf5d4bf3173e9b3859b9832cc84c5b12b48847

The funds will go to PrimeDAO's specified treasury address noted here 0x567d220B0169836cBF351DF70A9c517096ec9De7

Public Goods Funding Workstream Budget Q1 2022 
This vote is looking to pass the Q1 budget for the Public Goods Funding Workstream (PGFW).

The top level KPI of the PGFW continues to be to increase the GMV of Gitcoin Grants and related public goods funding mechanisms, both by scaling the right people into grants ops related roles, and by forming relevant strategic partnerships to further solidify Gitcoin as a credibly neutral public goods funding mechanism.

The total amount requested is 100k GTC over these 3 key areas:

Grassroots Community Efforts (20k GTC)
Gitcoin Grants Operations (45k GTC)
Community Partnerships (35k GTC)

Gitcoin's main treasury currently has 5.3m GTC. For more details please see this post: https://gov.gitcoin.co/t/proposal-public-goods-are-good-pgf-q1-budget-request/9416

DeveloperDAO Partnership 
This proposal seeks to ratify the mutual grant agreement outlined between GitcoinDAO and DeveloperDAO in the following Snapshot vote: 
https://snapshot.org/#/gitcoindao.eth/proposal/0xe74f2ddceaf3a50cb7c6de9ae1be5ace0bed4c5c34ca980adda8d323de1cd2c6

By ratifying this proposal, 50,000 GTC will be transferred to the DeveloperDAO treasury multisig located here: 0x7128f5ff32eD07Ce12E6a9deBE32BB40F9884b3C

To ensure long term alignment, DeveloperDAO will hold no less than 50% of the tokens received through 2023 and act as a meta-delegate in the Gitcoin ecosystem.

# Gitcoin DAO - Workstream Accountability Flow Ratification This vote is looking to ratify the GD Workstream Accountability Flow

New (improved) proposal framework: All proposals should ideally follow the following format: A tl;dr section at the top of the proposal summarizing the main points. This is for increased transparency and a smoother decision making process. If applicable, a milestone report containing goals achieved during the previous quarter. The milestone report should include: - number of current contributors (marked as FT or PT) - funds spent to date - perhaps adopting some quarterly reporting? - any funds carrying over to the next quarter - notable achievements for the quarter - have the actions of the workstream brought back value into the DAO/treasury (if applicable/quantifiable) NB> The flow of a proposal will still follow the steps laid out in the Gov process v2
For more details please see this post: [https://gov.gitcoin.co/t/gitcoin-dao-workstream-accountability-flow/9644]()

# DAO Operations Workstream Budget - Q1 2022 This vote is looking to pass the Q1 budget for the DAO Operations Workstream. As the governance rails begin to form for the DAO, it has become evident that operational support is a necessity. This workstream seeks to bring core operational functions to Gitcoin, while meeting the other workstream’s needs with templates, best practices and structure that will enable the growth and scale of Gitcoin for years to come.
The total amount requested is 39.5K GTC over these key areas:

Accounting (6K GTC) User Support (8K GTC)
Regulatory Considerations (5K GTC)
Community Experience (8K GTC)
Community Governance (6.5K GTC)
People Ops (6K GTC)

For more details please see this post: [https://gov.gitcoin.co/t/proposal-dao-operations-workstream-budget-q1-2022/9488]()

# Fraud Defence & Detection (FDD) - S13 Budget This vote is looking to pass the season 13 budget for FDD.
Work stream Mandate: Defend Gitcoin (Grants, DAO, & future products) from threats to its legitimacy, credible neutrality, and sustainability. FDD is requesting $879,000 (93,500 GTC\*) to fund Season 13 (S13) and replenish its reserves for S14. - \*UPDATED 2/22/22 to 145,000 GTC based on GTC price
High Level Budget BreakdownSeason 13 Budget Total = $596,295 = 74.1k GTC ($8.05/GTC)PLUS Season 14 Reserves = $596,295Total Needed = $1,192,590 MNUS Current Reserves = $313,000

\*Prices last updated 2/22/22 The GTC total will be adjusted based on the current market value at the time this proposal is moved to Snapshot and to Tally. The vote will be to send $879,590 in GTC at the current price when moved to Tally or the 20 day moving average (whichever is lower).
For more details please see this post: [https://gov.gitcoin.co/t/proposal-fdd-workstream-season-13-budget-request/9826/5]()

# Gitcoin Treasury Diversification (Part 1)
**Summary**

We propose moving $3 million of GTC (~1.35m GTC at time of writing) to a multisig wallet to execute the previously proposed treasury diversification. This will be exchanged for USDC via an agency desk in order to support critical DAO workstream funding needs. Any GTC that remains after the strategic diversification will be returned to the treasury. Given current market conditions and Gitcoin's operating needs, we think this is a prudent action to take.

**State of GitcoinDAO’s Treasury**

Today, GitcoinDAO’s treasury holds 23m GTC (roughly $57.1m). GitcoinDAO’s Treasury Vester holds another 26m GTC which will be distributed to the DAO over time.

The vast majority of the DAO’s treasury is held in GTC, with very little in stablecoins. At the end of May, the DAO held $280k in DAI and USDC.

**Rationale for Exchange**

Individual DAO workstreams have been funded in GTC and are now facing an asset-liability mismatch. Many contributors have wages denominated in USD terms, yet workstreams only have GTC with which to pay said contributors. With the market downturn, workstreams now face an increased risk of not being able to meet these obligations. We wanted to quickly ensure that workstreams can meet their obligations.

We’re engaging with a reputable agency desk to execute this transaction. The agency desk will utilize a broad range of liquidity sources to execute the transaction with approximately 10 bps of slippage or less. The agency desk will charge 20 bps as a fee and will likely be able to execute the transaction within 3-5 days. This will ensure that each workstream has the stables needed to meet near term expenses.

We’ve proposed working with a trusted agency desk on the transaction as an alternative to requiring workstreams to sell GTC on the open market, which would be inefficient, costly, and operationally riskier.

**Other Notes**

Any GTC that remains after these actions will be sent back to the treasury.

**Execution**

We will transfer ~$3m in GTC to a multisig address consisting of the following Gitcoin Stewards as signers:

 - Kyle | kbw.eth
 - Annika | wombat.eth
 - Shreyas Hariharan
 - Kris
 - Simona
 - James / Fire Eyes

This is the multisig address: 0x85e01c9E286A6b2bbc816Cf862911572eaa34F04. Kyle will then execute the diversification into stablecoins via the agency desk.

FDD-WG Q3 2021 Budget Proposal 2021 
This is a request to send 50,000 GTC to the FDD-WG multisig to fund their Q3 2021 budget.

This workstream has the primary mandate of defending the Gitcoin network against fraud, collusion, sybil attacks, and any other degradation of the system’s legitimacy. This extends to the legitimacy of the DAO tasked with shepherding the dGrants protocol as well.

For more info check the full proposal here: https://gov.gitcoin.co/t/proposal-fdd-wg-anti-fraud-sybil-collusion-q3-budget-request/8210

✨ CLRFund GTC Grant ✨ 
This proposal is to ratify the allocation of 40k GTC from the Community Treasury to CLRFund.

The Snapshot vote passed on Sep 4, 2021, with 3.04m GTC (93.77%) voting to Transfer 40k GTC to CLRFund.

The funds will go to the CLRFund contributors Gnosis Safe, 0xadca3cF41e2e2517F1862b3CA18E8beF561EEded, listed on in this GitHub repo: https://github.com/clrfund/governance.

As described by Auryn in discussion on the original forum post, funds will be used primarily to cover cost of three key roles over the next year (two developers and a product/prject manager) in order to expedite CLRFund's progress towards a production ready, trustless, and collusion resistant Quadtratic Funding protocol built using ZK-SNARK magic.
